description: Curated post-ACL rehab exercise library. Each entry maps a protocol exercise id to a YouTube video and 3 verbal cues. Used by coach_chat.py for grounded recommendations and by the chat UI for embedded video cards.

exercises.name: Quad Sets
cues: Lock the knee fully straight
Drive your heel into the table
Hold each contraction 5 seconds

exercises.name: Heel Slides
cues: Slide heel toward the glute, active only
Stop at first sign of swelling
Pause 2 seconds at end-range

exercises.name: Terminal Knee Extension (band)
cues: Loop band behind knee, anchor in front
Lock out the last 30 degrees only
No quad lag - re-cue if heel lifts

exercises.name: Stationary Bike (ROM-focus)
cues: Start with seat high, lower 1cm per session
RPE 4 out of 10 - conversational
Add resistance only if pain-free

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
cues: Squeeze glutes before you lift
Drive through both heels evenly
Pause 2 seconds at the top

exercises.name: Wall Sit
cues: Knees track over toes, do not cave in
Start at 60 degrees, deepen weekly
Stop if anterior knee pain

exercises.name: Mini Squat (0-45 deg)
cues: Hinge at hips first, then bend knees
Stop at 45 degrees - no deeper this week
Even weight in both feet, mirror check

exercises.name: Single-Leg Squat
cues: Hip, knee, and second toe stay aligned
Counterbalance with arms forward
Slow descent: 3 seconds down, 1 up
